channel.title: GitHub TeX Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of TeX in GitHub

item.title: HarisIqbal88/PlotNeuralNet
item.description: Latex code for making neural networks diagrams

item.title: vdumoulin/conv_arithmetic
item.description: A technical report on convolution arithmetic in the context of deep learning

item.title: tuhdo/os01
item.description: Bootstrap yourself to write an OS from scratch. A book for self-learner.

item.title: acl-org/acl-style-files
item.description: Official style files for papers submitted to venues of the Association for Computational Linguistics

item.title: rstudio/cheatsheets
item.description: Posit Cheat Sheets - Can also be found at https://posit.co/resources/cheatsheets/.

item.title: billryan/resume
item.description: An elegant \LaTeX\ résumé template. 大陆镜像 https://gods.coding.net/p/resume/git

item.title: AllenDowney/ThinkPython2
item.description: LaTeX source and supporting code for Think Python, 2nd edition, by Allen Downey.

item.title: artificial-scientist-lab/PyTheus
item.description: PyTheus, a highly-efficient inverse-design algorithm for quantum optical experiments

item.title: libretro/docs
item.description: This is a repo of the RetroArch official document page.

item.title: Wandmalfarbe/pandoc-latex-template
item.description: A pandoc LaTeX template to convert markdown files to PDF or LaTeX.
